recommendations.title: Diary of a Nymphomaniac
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of a middle-class French girl's sexual adventures, her then fall into prostitution, and her ultimate redemption.

recommendations.title: Only Mine
recommendations.overview: Tormented and left for dead by a scorned lover, a woman finds the strength within herself to recover and retaliate against her abuser.

recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.

recommendations.title: Alien Abduction: Incident in Lake County
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious blackout, a son goes out to investigate and captures footage of actual aliens. When the aliens follow he and his brothers back to their home all hell breaks lose.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.
